methodology.exact_drug_exclusion: atlas arms mentioning the target drug or alias are removed per target row
methodology.overfit_boundary: primary k=8 is fixed and not optimized on target labels; observed ORR is used only for evaluation metrics
prediction_inputs_not_used: fitted model over the target rows
prediction_inputs_used: target therapy family derived from broad MOA
Atlas tissue, therapy class, monotherapy flag, biomarker flag, line bucket, and arm text for filtering
methodology.primary_filter: all-comer monotherapy: is_combination != true and biomarker != yes
methodology.primary_formula: n/(n+8) * disease_therapy_ORR + 8/(n+8) * global_therapy_ORR; falls back to the predefined hierarchy when either cell is unavailable
methodology.weighting: weighted mean ORR by orr_denom when available; otherwise weight 1
